description: Standard: editorial images for housing article

images.description: Aerial view of a neighborhood showing a stark contrast: on the left, densely packed low-rise apartment buildings with flat roofs, some with visible damage; on the right, new construction with green spaces and modern architecture
images.editorial_context: Lead image for article on housing inequality

images.description: Bar chart with 5 bars showing median home prices by neighborhood: Eastside $180K, Northgate $245K, Downtown $520K, Riverside $310K, Westpark $680K
images.editorial_context: Supporting data visualization in same article

images.description: Abstract geometric pattern in blue and grey used as a section divider

description: European: images for EU parliament article

images.description: A wide shot of the European Parliament hemicycle in Strasbourg during a plenary session. The chamber is about two-thirds full. Electronic voting boards are visible above the speaker's platform.
images.editorial_context: Lead image for article about EU legislative process
